action.reasoning: Observation: Linear probe training produced extremely poor results (val_f1=0.0046) - essentially broken, likely due to truncated class_weights code or wrong hyperparameters. The fine-tuned model remains best at 0.3789. ~20 min remaining. Analysis: The cached CLIP features (129809x768 train, 14961x768 val) are valid. A sklearn LogisticRegression on these features should work well and be fast. This avoids the PyTorch training bugs. Decision: Write a quick sklearn-based linear probe script using cached features, save compatible checkpoint, and submit eval.
